import axios from"axios";const API_BASE_URL="http://localhost:8000/api";const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});// PRODUCT APIs
export const productAPI={getAll:()=>apiClient.get("/products"),getById:id=>apiClient.get("/products/".concat(id)),create:data=>apiClient.post("/products",data),update:(id,data)=>apiClient.put("/products/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>apiClient.delete("/products/".concat(id))};// ORDER APIs
export const orderAPI={getAll:()=>apiClient.get("/orders"),getById:id=>apiClient.get("/orders/".concat(id)),create:data=>apiClient.post("/orders",data)};// DELIVERY APIs
export const deliveryAPI={getById:id=>apiClient.get("/deliveries/".concat(id)),create:data=>apiClient.post("/deliveries",data),start:id=>apiClient.post("/deliveries/".concat(id,"/start")),confirm:(id,data)=>apiClient.post("/deliveries/".concat(id,"/confirm"),data)};// LOGS APIs
export const logsAPI={getAll:function(){let limit=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:100;return apiClient.get("/logs?limit=".concat(limit));},getByService:function(service){let limit=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:50;return apiClient.get("/logs/".concat(service,"?limit=").concat(limit));}};export default apiClient;
